ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hazards" (
  "hazard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hazard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hazard */,
  "likelihood" TEXT /* Likelihood of the risk occurring (Low/Medium/High) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the risk (Low/Medium/High) */,
  "controls_needed" TEXT /* Whether further controls are necessary to mitigate the risk */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the hazard (e.g., environmental, physical, etc.) */,
  "mitigation_strategy" TEXT /* Overview of the strategy to mitigate the risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hazard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "at_risk_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity at risk */,
  "hazard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hazard associated with this entity */,
  "who_affected" TEXT /* Description of who or what is affected */,
  "how_affected" TEXT /* Explanation of how the entity could be affected */,
  "potential_consequences" TEXT /* Description of potential consequences if the risk materializes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_at_risk_entities_hazard_id FOREIGN KEY ("hazard_id") REFERENCES hazards ("hazard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "existing_controls" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control measure */,
  "hazard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hazard this control is mitigating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the existing control measure */,
  "control_type" TEXT /* Type of control (e.g., engineering, administrative, etc.) */,
  "effectiveness" TEXT /* Assessment of the control's effectiveness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_existing_controls_hazard_id FOREIGN KEY ("hazard_id") REFERENCES hazards ("hazard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk assessment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment was conducted */,
  "final_decision" TEXT /* Final decision made regarding the risk management */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Assessed risk level (Low/Medium/High) */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for further actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_assessments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event is scheduled */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., concert, conference, etc.) */,
  "expected_attendance" INTEGER /* Expected number of attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessment_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the risk assessment related to this action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action to be taken */,
  "action_by" TEXT /* User responsible for the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessment_actions_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES risk_assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_levels" (
  "risk_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk level (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk level */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for visual representation (e.g., green, yellow, red) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in risk management */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event related to this notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., reminder, alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decision_logs" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision log */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the assessment related to this decision */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date of the decision */,
  "decision_made" TEXT /* Details of the decision made */,
  "rationale" TEXT /* Rationale behind the decision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_decision_logs_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES risk_assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_history" (
  "event_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event history record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "risk_assessment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the risk assessment conducted */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Description of actions taken during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_history_risk_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_assessment_id") REFERENCES risk_assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_history_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
